subcodes.first_line: God testifieth that there is none other God but Him, and He it is Who speaketh in every state: "There is none other God but Me, the Almighty." [3.5s]
subcodes.first_line_orig: شهد الله انه لا اله الا هو و هو الذی ینطق فی کل شان لا اله الا انا المقتدر
subcodes.subjects: @transcendence; unknowability of God, @love as fire, @the Word of God; influence and centrality of, @call to action
